stemHtml: When shall the Rules of the Air, comprising both ICAO Annex 2 and SERA, apply to all aircraft?

options.a: They apply only to aircraft registered in a Member State while operating in controlled airspace.
options.b: They apply exclusively to IFR flights operating within the territory of a Member State.
options.c: Within the territory of a Member State, SERA applies to all aircraft; and for aircraft of a Member State, both SERA and ICAO Annex 2 apply wherever they operate outside that State’s airspace, provided they do not conflict with the rules published by the State having jurisdiction.
options.d: ICAO Annex 2 applies to all aircraft only when they are operating over the high seas, and SERA applies only within the European Union.
